subject: Heracross — a blue-bodied beetle Pokemon with a single prominent horn, clawed hands, and yellow eyes, depicted in explosive combat action
description: Heracross charges forward in a dynamic action pose, its blue-and-purple exoskeleton clearly visible. A single prominent horn rises from the top of its head, curving slightly forward. Yellow eyes are visible on the rounded face. The creature's clawed hands are raised or outstretched. Red slash-energy lines radiate dramatically from the figure, and chunks of rocky debris scatter through the air. The background features rocky terrain with warm earthy tones — orange and tan ground with a light sky. The overall scene conveys explosive physical power and ferocity despite the relatively small stature of the figure.
foreground: scattered rocky debris on earthen ground
background: rocky terrain with light sky and warm ambient haze
emotion: fierce and relentless; explosive forward aggression
